questionHtml: Write the equation and name the organic product when ethanol reacts with methanoic acid.
markschemeHtml:
Equation:
CH3CH2OH + HCOOH ⇌ HCOOCH2CH3 + H2O ✓

Product name:
ethyl methanoate ✓

Accept equation without equilibrium arrows.

Accept equation with molecular formulas (C2H6O + CH2O2 ⇌ C3H6O2 + H2O) only if product name is correct.

meta.title: Write the equation and name the organic product when ethanol reacts with methanoic acid.
